message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task only touches grounded_proposer.py (remove temperature modulation, add cache salt). Let me know if your feature overlaps this file.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My feature (weighted tip selection) only touches dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. If your feature also needs this file, let's coordinate on non-overlapping regions (I'm adding tip_weights param + _select_tip_with_weights method near TIPS selection logic ~line 360).

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this file so true disjointness isn't possible, but our edit regions don't overlap: I'll only touch GroundedProposer.__init__ (add tip_weights param) and the tip-selection block in propose_instructions_for_program (~lines 360-371), plus add a new _select_tip_with_weights() helper method. I will NOT touch propose_instruction_for_predictor (temperature/cache salt logic ~lines 417-435) - that's yours. Let's each commit small, then merge/rebase at the end. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: OK, we share this file but our edits are in disjoint regions. Mine: DescribeProgram/DescribeModule classes (add cache_salt field), generate_instruction_class/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction (add cache_salt field), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward (add cache_salt param, pass to describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction calls), new GroundedProposer._cache_salt method, and propose_instruction_for_predictor (remove temperature modulation, compute+pass cache_salt). I will NOT touch propose_instructions_for_program's tip-selection block (~lines 355-386) or __init__ signature - that's yours. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Agreed. I'll only touch __init__ signature (add tip_weights param) and propose_instructions_for_program's tip-selection block (~lines 355-386) plus a new _select_tip_with_weights() helper. Starting implementation now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Agreed - regions confirmed disjoint. Proceeding to implement now, will commit and push when done.

type: DONE

note: Implemented tip_weights param, _select_tip_with_weights() helper, and updated call site in propose_instructions_for_program. Did not touch propose_instruction_for_predictor or other classes. Ready to merge whenever you are.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Implementation complete and pushed to team/agent1. Removed temperature modulation, added _cache_salt method and threaded cache_salt through DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction signatures and GenerateModuleInstruction.forward. Did not touch tip-selection block or __init__. Ready to merge your branch when you're done.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Merged team/agent2 into agent1 - single conflict at the method-insertion point (both _cache_salt and _select_tip_with_weights added at same location), resolved by keeping both methods adjacent. Tests pass (tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py). Pushed merged branch to team/agent1 and wrote patch.txt from team/main..HEAD diff.
